desc: Replace terminal intent gate with computed/detected/prompt audit — agents answer only gaps, not forms

init.desc: Synthetic init — roots all independent tasks

computed-sections.desc: Assemble commit-status, test-evidence, audit-trail from completed.json receipts at advance time. Terminal advance reads completion records and builds these sections mechanically — no agent input. Output: computedReport object on the advance result.

gap-detection.desc: Mechanically detect: (1) uncovered consumes[] edges — consume not validated by any shell/artifact-exists, (2) scope leaks — changed files outside any produces[], (3) untested produces — produce files not referenced by any shell test command. Returns detected gaps as structured array.

terminal-audit-validator.desc: New validator type 'terminal-audit'. Runs computed sections + gap detection, generates prompts only for detected gaps, validates agent responses address each detected item. Replaces both the propagated artifact-exists/shell validators and the intent gate on terminal nodes. fail_if: detected items not addressed in prompt answers.

inline-evaluation.desc: Two-phase advance for terminal nodes. Phase 1: advance without --evaluate-file runs mechanical validators + gap detection, returns context packet (computed sections + detected gaps + specific prompts). Phase 2: advance with --evaluate-file containing responses to detected gaps only. If no gaps detected, auto-passes — no file needed. Eliminate generic prompt questions.

speckit-integration.desc: Update tasksToDAG to inject terminal-audit validator instead of propagated artifact-exists + shell + intent gate. Remove the old 3-step injection (artifact propagation, shell propagation, intent gate). Single terminal-audit validator replaces all three.

integration-test.desc: Full E2E: create DAG via roadmap make, verify terminal node has terminal-audit validator, advance all nodes, advance term without --evaluate-file (get context packet with gaps), advance term with responses (auto-pass if no gaps). Verify computed sections are correct, detected gaps match reality.

validate.command: npx vitest run tests/cli-intake-enforcement.test.ts tests/make-input-verification.test.ts tests/gitsafe-multirepo.test.ts

validate.statement: All work complete — structured completion report required
prompt:
Provide a completion report:
1. COMMIT STATUS: Are all produces committed? List each file and its commit SHA.
2. TEST EVIDENCE: What tests ran and passed? What is untested?
3. UNVALIDATED ASSUMPTIONS: What did this DAG rely on that has no shell or artifact-exists validator?
4. FAILURE SURFACE: What input would break the weakest node? Name the node and failure mode.
5. SCOPE DECISIONS: What was intentionally excluded and why?
6. AUDIT TRAIL: What artifacts exist for a human reviewer to verify this work?
